name: pi-process-monitor
description_en: Non-blocking background watcher for pi — start a process, SSH poll, or log tail and get pinged in-session on milestones, failure, or exit. Claude Code's Monitor tool, with conditional delivery.
description_zh: pi 的非阻塞后台监视器 — 启动进程、SSH 轮询或日志跟踪，并在里程碑、失败或退出时在会话中收到通知。Claude Code 的 Monitor 工具，具有条件传递功能。
